title: Peaks Decomposition Result v2 (multi-pass)
description: v2 multi-pass slice decomposition output. Emitted by `peaks-slice-decompose` and the new `MultiPassOrchestrator`. Discriminated by `schemaVersion: 'v2'`. v1 files (no schemaVersion) remain readable via SchemaRouter.

passes.description: One entry per decomposition pass (Pass 1 = service, Pass 2 = file, Pass 3 = sub-file reserved).

crossPassEdges.description: Edges connecting slices in different passes. Static (type-shares, fixture-shares, import-re-export) and LLM-arbitrated.

llmArbitrations.description: Trace of every LLM call made during decomposition. Capped at 2 calls per peaks slice decompose invocation per the global LLM 兜底 budget.

partial.description: True iff any pass failed to complete and the result is a partial decomposition.

PassConfig.description: Configuration for a single decomposition pass. Currently informational; the orchestrator picks pass configs.

scopeFilter.description: Optional list of files (or semantic anchors) to scope this pass to.

SliceV2.description: A single v2 slice, scoped to one pass. Pass 2/3 slices have a non-null parentSliceId; Pass 1 slices have parentSliceId: null.

id.description: Stable id within this pass (e.g. "S1" for Pass 1, "S1.3" for Pass 2 child of S1).

parentSliceId.description: Parent slice id from the previous pass, or null for Pass 1.

semanticAnchor.description: Domain anchor; "domain:<name>" if understand-anything indexed, else "file:<path>".

InternalEdge.description: Edge connecting two slices within the same pass.

weight.description: Edge weight for downstream min-cut / dispatch-ordering heuristics.

CrossPassEdge.description: Edge connecting a slice in one pass to a slice in another pass. Static (type-shares, fixture-shares, import-re-export) or LLM-arbitrated.

evidence.description: Human-readable evidence: the import line, shared fixture id, etc.

arbitratedBy.description: The LlmArbitration.callId that produced this edge, or null for static edges.

LlmArbitration.description: Record of one LLM call made during decomposition.

promptHash.description: sha256 hex of the prompt (used for content-hash cache lookup).

PassResult.description: The slices + internal edges produced by one decomposition pass.

CodegraphEnvelope.description: Local project-analysis evidence envelope. Untrusted supporting evidence, never authoritative for QA verdict.

freshness.description: Git commit SHA at which the codegraph index was built, or 'unindexed'.

UnderstandAnythingEnvelope.description: Understand-anything knowledge-graph envelope. `available: false` means semantic-only downstream behaviour is disabled.
